title: Luminance PvP Resource Pack by Cryngel
description: Bright white Netherite gear and rare items for clearer PvP battles and easier Nether exploration.
body:
![Visual 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e9295be33e55dd629cf781d9f52ab11f3badd9a_0.webp)

# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the textures of key PvP elements, making them more contrasting and convenient for dynamic battles:



Netherite set: all tools, weapons, and armor pieces (except horse armor and nautilus shell) have been completely redesigned.



Food: golden apple, enchanted golden apple, and golden carrot have received an updated look.



Totem of Undying: reduced in size for better visibility in the left hand and received a stylish purple texture.



Experience bottle: reduced in size for use in critical moments.



Netherite scrap: given a pronounced purple tint for better visibility when mining in the Nether.



Ender Pearl and Eye of Ender: recolored in a contrasting light style for clear tracking in the air.



![Fa_Kb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e77c098524bfcce9d45bf7603f197a6a569f417.png)

**In addition, the textures were changed for the netherite sword with enchantments:**



Fire aspect



Knockback



![Visual 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/019ba2574f3aa1def3c70ef0bea88faac6cf5e69.png)



# Note: 

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
